aboleth.saving_throws: Foundry 2024 actors24 marks aboleth dex-proficient (save +3); 5e-bits 2024 lists only con/int/wis saves. Two 2024 transcriptions disagree; Foundry value preserved.

antitoxin.weight: 5e-bits ships weight=0 for antitoxin vial; Foundry/canonical assigns 0.1 lb. SRD doesn't state a weight; both are reasonable encodings of "trivial".

elf-wood.walk_speed: Foundry's Wood Elf leaf ships the 2024 SRD's 35 ft Wood Elf speed; the 5e-bits oracle merges all elf lineages onto the base elf (30 ft) and does not carry the per-lineage +5 ft. Foundry is the more precise 2024 source; value preserved.
